message:
feat(attention,reservations,mail): adaptive heartbeats, robust reservation tracking, and conditional mail events

Attention stream (server.go, robot/attention_feed.go):
- Replace fixed 30s heartbeat ticker with an adaptive timer that shifts
  between recovery (1s), idle (5s), and high-activity (30s) intervals
  based on stream activity, source health, and whether a cursor replay is
  in progress; manual ?heartbeat= override still respected
- Extract writeAttentionReplay helper to reuse replay logic and track
  cursor advancement uniformly across replay and live paths
- Enrich heartbeat payload with stream_id, cursor_position,
  subscriber_count, events_since_start, idle_ms, last_event_time, and
  per-source health counters (healthy/degraded/unavailable)
- Add attentionHeartbeatSourceSummary and summarizeAttentionHeartbeatSources
  to surface source-health signals into the heartbeat

File reservations (watcher/file_reservation.go):
- Replace bulk map-clear on shutdown/idle with granular removeTrackedReservation
  that surgically removes only the IDs/files confirmed released, leaving
  concurrently added reservations intact
- Add reservationReleaseComplete helper; idle and stop release loops now
  skip map mutation until the server confirms a complete release
- RenewReservations now aggregates per-pane errors and returns them via
  errors.Join instead of silently discarding them; partial-renewal is
  also surfaced as an error

Mail event correctness (serve/mail.go):
- handleMarkMessageRead and handleAckMessage now gate event publishing on
  the operation actually succeeding (ReadResult.Read / AckResult.Acknowledged)
  and include read_at / acknowledged_at timestamps in the event payload
- handleForceReleaseReservation returns HTTP 409 Conflict when the server
  denies the release (result.Success == false) rather than silently
  returning a success envelope with force_released: false

Additional changes:
- assign/reservation.go: extend reservation model and test coverage
- cli/: coordinator, git, handoff, locks, mail, unlock CLI layer updates
- handoff/transfer.go: handoff transfer logic and tests
- hooks/config.go, hooks_io_test.go: hook configuration additions
- state/runtime_schema.go, runtime_store.go: runtime state schema updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
